div.p: Implementation-grade state transition and concurrency logic.
asm mov rax, [bottom] ; Read current bottom dec rax ; Decrement (b-1) mov [bottom], rax ; Tentative store

ol.li: We claim the slot before checking if it's valid.
Thieves see a smaller queue immediately.

div.p: asm mov rcx, [top] ; Read thief index
asm mov rax, [bottom] inc rax mov [bottom], rax ; Restore bottom xor rax, rax ; return NULL ret
asm mov rdi, [buffer + b*8] ; Read object mov rax, rcx ; expected t lea rdx, [rcx + 1] ; new t+1 lock cmpxchg [top], rdx ; CAS(top, t, t+1) jnz .lost_race ; ... success ...
asm mov rax, [buffer + b*8] ; Extract item ret ; Success
Logic: Thieves are at index t. Owner is at b-1. Since t < b-1, no overlap is possible.
